parsed.production_notes: The top half features a 3D-animated AI avatar with smooth, stylized features and slightly unnatural lip-sync. The bottom half is a human actor recorded in a real-world environment.

characters.appearance: Female, young adult, 3D animated style, brown complexion, long wavy black hair, large brown eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Bright blue blazer over a light blue top.

characters.appearance: Male, young adult, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, short beard, wearing glasses.

scenes.setting: Top: Abstract digital background. Bottom: Room with a water dispenser.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated female character with brown skin, long wavy black hair, and large brown eyes. She wears a bright blue blazer over a light blue top. The background is an abstract digital pattern in shades of purple and blue. She looks directly forward.

A young man with brown skin, short black hair, a short beard, and glasses. He wears a dark grey polo shirt. He sits in a room with white walls. A water dispenser and a black bag are visible behind him. He looks forward.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with an AI avatar on top and a human man on the bottom having a conversation. Various text overlays and graphics appear over the video.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ಹಾಯ್, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. ನಾಳೆ ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂ ಹ್ಯಾವಿಂಗ್. [Hi, I want to learn English. Having an interview tomorrow.]
Character A says: Do you want to learn English speaking?
Character B says: ಹೌದು. ನೀನು ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದಾ? [Yes. Can you speak in Kannada?]
Character A says: ಖಂಡಿತ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. ನಿನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಅಂತ ಇದಿಯಾ? [Certainly I will speak. Do you want to learn English?]
Character B says: ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಇಷ್ಟ ಇದೆ. ಬಟ್ ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಕು? ನಮ್ಮ ಹತ್ರ ದುಡ್ಡು, ಟೈಮ್ ಎರಡೂ ಇಲ್ಲ. [I want to learn English. But what to do? I don't have money or time.]
Character A says: MySivi ಆಪ್ ನ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡು. ದಿನಾ ನನ್ ಜೊತೆಗೆ 15 ರಿಂದ 20 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ, within 30 days ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ. [Try the MySivi app. If you practice with me for 15 to 20 minutes daily, within 30 days you will speak English very well.]
Character B says: ಹಾ, ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಟೀಚರ್ ಯಾರು ಇರ್ತಾರೆ? [Yes, who will be the teacher in this?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
learn English
Speaking
MySivi
15-20 mins
30 DAYS
(Kannada subtitles)

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface with a white background. At the top is a 3D illustration of a small blue and white robot. Below the robot are several circular icons containing small illustrations, such as hands clapping, a dumbbell, a book, a sun, and a family.

scenes.visual_description: A full-screen view of a mobile application interface showing a dashboard with a robot mascot, progress indicators, and a grid of learning topics.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ನನ್ನಂತಹ AI teachers step-by-step ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ. [AI teachers like me will teach English step-by-step.]

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout returns with the AI avatar on top and the human man on the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ನೀನು ಮಾಡೋ ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನ ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ನಿನ್ನನ್ನ ಜಡ್ಜ್ ಕೂಡ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ. [They will correct the mistakes you make. They won't even judge you.]
Character B says: ಹಾಗಿದ್ರೆ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡ್ಬಿಟ್ಟು ನೋಡ್ತೀನಿ. [If so, I will try and see.]

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues. Various graphics overlay the video, including an app installation prompt and a large number graphic.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ಇವತ್ತೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. 50 ಲಕ್ಷಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಜನ ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಬರಿ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ನ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಿ. [Download the MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people have learned English by practicing in this. Start your trial right now for just 1 rupee. Speak English awesomely.]
